name: SQL Injection Pattern
description: Detects common SQL injection payloads in HTTP URLs and query strings.
analyst_action: Review request context, impacted route, server response, and application input validation.

name: Cross-Site Scripting Pattern
description: Detects script tags, JavaScript handlers, and encoded XSS payload indicators.
analyst_action: Validate whether output encoding and request filtering blocked the payload.

name: Sensitive Path Reconnaissance
description: Detects requests to administrative, backup, debug, and configuration paths.
analyst_action: Check whether the source requested multiple sensitive paths or returned successful responses.

name: Authentication Brute Force
description: Detects repeated failed authentication events from the same source.
analyst_action: Investigate affected accounts, lock or reset credentials if needed, and block abusive sources.
